mapper.insert: insert into am_login_failure_limit (username, failure_count, lock_level, first_failed_at, last_failed_at, cleanup_after) values (#{username}, 1, 0, #{now}, #{now}, #{cleanupAfter}) on conflict (username) do nothing
mapper.select: select username, failure_count, lock_level, first_failed_at, last_failed_at, locked_until, cleanup_after, created_at, updated_at from am_login_failure_limit where username = #{username} for update
mapper.update: update am_login_failure_limit set failure_count = #{failureCount}, lock_level = #{lockLevel}, first_failed_at = #{firstFailedAt}, last_failed_at = #{lastFailedAt}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, cleanup_after = #{cleanupAfter}, updated_at = localtimestamp where username = #{username}
